visualization_recommendation.primary: Year x Topic heatmap for temporal evolution
visualization_recommendation.secondary: Smoothed line plot for topic trajectories
visualization_recommendation.monthly: Year-Month heatmap when month metadata exists (Springer journals)
visualization_recommendation.cross_journal: Cosine/JSD clustermap + specialization index + distinctive topic z-scores

metrics_used: Cosine similarity between journal topic profiles
KL specialization index relative to global profile
Temporal JSD between early and late periods
